provider: HKUST 2025/26 BBA in Finance and BSc in Quantitative Finance Major Requirements
note: The two official Major Requirement PDFs identify the coded required courses, alternatives, credits and the bounded Quantitative Finance elective lists. Open FINA electives defined only by subject and level are not expanded into a fabricated closed list. University Common Core and School requirements are outside this Programme-local course supplement, so the published rows must not be treated as a graduation-completion decision.
